data.content: Implementation review rejected: pulldown formatting changes are present, but required validation is not green in this checkout. Verified: tests pass. Failing gates: bunx tsc --noEmit and bun run build fail in main/src/stories/* with Storybook prop/type errors; bun run lint fails because generated .worktrees/.next artifacts are being linted, and the new src/components/__tests__/interaction-picker-formatting.test.tsx introduces an unused local (testDate).
